title: taraxacum tuvense
intro: Taraxacum tuvense, also known as the Taraxacum mongolicum or Mongolian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Mongolian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum tuvense include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Taraxacum tuvense is often prepared as a tea or supplement, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
